summary: Large Green Greens stage decompilation PR centered on src/melee/gr/grgreens.c. It fills in multiple previously stubbed or low-match functions, adds Green Greens ground vars, exposes grmaterial declarations through the header, updates grgreens prototypes, and adjusts GALE01 data symbol splits. Automated bot feedback reported two new function matches, many unmatched-item improvements, plus .sdata and .data regressions.

key_files.role: Primary decompilation target; added Green Greens state-machine logic, block-grid logic, helper tables, includes, randrange cleanup, typed ground-vars access, and several function implementations.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grgreens.c hunks adding grGreens_80213C10, grGreens_80214B58, grGreens_802150C4, grGreens_80215D54, grGreens_80215ED8, grGreens_802166C4, grGreens_80216C20
text_corpus issue_comment: bot reports grGreens_802139C4 and grGreens_80214674 reached 100%, and 12 unmatched-item improvements

key_files.role: Adds struct grGreens_GroundVars2 and adds greens2 to the Ground union.
evidence_refs: raw_diff lines 1155-1183: new grGreens_GroundVars2 fields x0 through x24 and union member greens2

key_files.role: Replaces UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS for recovered Green Greens function signatures.
evidence_refs: raw_diff lines 1088-1106: grGreens_802150C4, grGreens_80215D54, grGreens_80215ED8 prototypes updated

key_files.role: Moves grMaterial declarations into the header so Green Greens code can call material helpers with visible prototypes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff lines 1132-1149: grMaterial_801C8D44, grMaterial_801C8E48, and related declarations added to header

key_files.role: Removes source-local grMaterial declarations that were moved to the header.
evidence_refs: raw_diff lines 1110-1127: local declarations removed from grmaterial.c

key_files.role: Adjusts Green Greens .data symbol sizes and splits around grGr_803E7728/grGr_803E7733 and grGr_803E7840/grGr_803E787C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff lines 1-17: symbols.txt changes for grGr_803E7728, grGr_803E7733, grGr_803E7840, grGr_803E787C

what_changed: Implemented or substantially filled in Green Greens stage routines, including grGreens_80213C10 state handling, grGreens_80214B58, block spawning and update routines, and grGreens_80216C20.
Added static stage data tables for animation/state sequencing and a Vec3 direction table, and resized grGr_803E7840 from a zeroed 128-entry s16 array to a 30-entry initialized s16 array.
Expanded the local grGr_params struct with additional unknown integer and float parameter fields through x78.
Added lbaudio_ax and itwhispyapple includes, with new calls to lbAudioAx_800237A8 and it_802EE200 in Green Greens logic.
Added grGreens_GroundVars2 in types.h and used gp->gv.greens2 for fields used by the new wind/tree/apple state code.
Updated grgreens.h prototypes for recovered signatures and moved grmaterial declarations from grmaterial.c into grmaterial.h.
Changed GALE01 symbol metadata for Green Greens data ranges, splitting previously larger symbols into smaller typed/untyped ranges.

Automated bot report: matched code increased by 520 bytes; grGreens_802139C4 and grGreens_80214674 became new matches; grGreens_80213C10 improved to 88.54%; .sdata broke from 100% to 81.82%; .data regressed from 27.39% to 25.84%.

smart_moves.text: Recovered function signatures were propagated to grgreens.h instead of keeping UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS after bodies were added.
A second Green Greens ground-vars struct was added and used through gp->gv.greens2 rather than leaving the newly recovered state-machine fields as raw offsets.
Repeated block-coordinate setup in grGreens_8021483C was expressed as for loops over the 30 JObj indices and 5 rows rather than as copied generated-looking blocks.
Header ownership was improved for grmaterial declarations by removing source-local prototypes from grmaterial.c and adding them to grmaterial.h.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When newly recovered stage logic uses additional per-stage Ground fields, introducing a temporary typed GroundVars struct and union arm can make state-machine code reviewable and avoid raw offset access.
evidence_refs: raw_diff grgreens.c uses gp->gv.greens2 across grGreens_80213C10 and fn_80213B1C

decomp_lessons.lesson: When recovered function bodies prove signatures, update the owning header and remove UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS at the same time.
Array-indexed stage animation/state tables can be a readable way to express large switch/state-machine behavior when the diff shows repeated grAnime calls indexed by state and side flags.
evidence_refs: raw_diff grGreens_80213C10 uses grGr_803E7734, grGr_803E775C, grGr_803E777C, grGr_803E77B4, grGr_803E77D4

naming_conventions.name: greens2
naming_conventions.lesson: The PR kept an address-style/structural name for a second Green Greens vars block instead of inventing semantic names for unknown fields.

naming_conventions.name: col,row
naming_conventions.lesson: Some block-grid routines were renamed from generic i,j to col,row where grid role was visible from getBlock and block update callsites.

naming_conventions.name: left_max,left_min,left_top,left_bottom,right_max,right_min,right_top,right_bottom
naming_conventions.lesson: Recovered boundary computations in grGreens_8021483C used role-based local names instead of f-register style names.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used natural for loops for repeated JObj scanning and row coordinate generation in grGreens_8021483C.
Used typed ground-vars accesses through gp->gv.greens and gp->gv.greens2 rather than raw pointer arithmetic for recovered state fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff grGreens_80213C10 and fn_80213B1C greens2 access

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Converted a plain JObj null check in grGreens_8021483C to HSD_ASSERT(1014, jobj).

Introduced a temporary alias new_var = gobj in grGreens_80214674 before passing it to several callees; bot output reports this function became a 100% match, but the PR evidence does not explain whether the alias was required for register/lifetime matching.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: grGreens_80214674 new match +19 bytes 93.68% to 100.00%

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjusted data symbol boundaries in symbols.txt around Green Greens .data objects, but automated feedback still reported .data and .sdata regressions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: .sdata broken match and .data regression

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Matched code increased 66.22% (+520 bytes); 2 new matches: grGreens_802139C4 and grGreens_80214674. 12 unmatched items improved, including grGreens_80213C10 to 88.54%. Report also flagged one broken .sdata match and one .data regression.

follow_up_queries: Green Greens greens2 GroundVars field names and semantics x0 x4 x8 xC x10 x14 x18 x20 x24
grGreens_80214674 new_var gobj alias required for match
PR 2439 .sdata broken match grgreens grGr_804D6AAD u8 s8
PR 2439 .data regression Green Greens symbol split grGr_803E7728 grGr_803E7733 grGr_803E7840 grGr_803E787C
grMaterial declarations in grmaterial.h static prototypes include style
Green Greens block grid getBlock col row naming

evidence_refs: metadata_json for PR identity, state, changed file list, and counts
raw_diff.diff for changed code excerpts and header/type/symbol changes
notes: PR body is empty and there are no human review comments in the loaded slice.
The full diff is large and the inline diff excerpt was truncated; targeted reads were used for header/type/grmaterial details.
Automated bot output supports code-match and regression facts, but no local build command, objdiff invocation, or author rationale is present in the slice.
Several new fields and tables retain address-style or x-offset names; semantic meanings should not be inferred beyond the code shown.
The PR was merged per metadata, but merge status alone is not treated as acceptance of any general standard or data-symbol rationale.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed temporary GroundVars structs can clarify recovered stage state machines
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2439 added grGreens_GroundVars2 and used gp->gv.greens2 for newly recovered Green Greens state fields instead of raw offsets. This is a candidate example of typed-fields-over-pointer-math for stage work, while preserving x-offset field names where semantics were not proven.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recovered signatures should be reflected in owning headers
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2439 replaced UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS for grGreens_802150C4, grGreens_80215D54, and grGreens_80215ED8 in grgreens.h after adding/recovering bodies in grgreens.c.

source_update_candidates.title: Green Greens stage decomp work touches grgreens.c, grgreens.h, types.h, grmaterial declarations, and GALE01 symbols
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2439 changed src/melee/gr/grgreens.c, src/melee/gr/grgreens.h, src/melee/gr/types.h, src/melee/gr/grmaterial.c, src/melee/gr/grmaterial.h, and config/GALE01/symbols.txt for Green Greens stage decompilation.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-scope fact for future Green Greens and grmaterial decomp searches; route to curator rather than promoting directly.

source_update_candidates.title: Do not overgeneralize temporary alias locals without verifier evidence
source_update_candidates.text: grGreens_80214674 introduced Ground_GObj* new_var = gobj and bot output reported the function reached 100%. The slice does not show why the alias was needed. This may be a narrow matching tactic example, not a general style rule.
source_update_candidates.reason: Candidate cautionary example for matching-tactics-need-evidence; the evidence supports the tactic occurring and a match result, but not a broad recommendation.

source_update_candidates.title: PR 2439 introduced Green Greens data symbol splits with reported data regressions
source_update_candidates.text: The PR split/resized Green Greens .data symbols in config/GALE01/symbols.txt around grGr_803E7728/grGr_803E7733 and grGr_803E7840/grGr_803E787C. Bot feedback reported .sdata and .data regressions in the same unit.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: .sdata broken match and .data regression
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential data-section follow-up fact; should be curated carefully because the PR slice does not explain the symbol ownership rationale.

rejection_notes: Do not infer semantic names for greens2 fields from this PR; fields remain x-offset style in the evidence.
Do not treat grmaterial static declarations in a header as a global standard from this slice alone; it may be a local include/prototype workaround and needs curator review.
Do not claim all changed functions matched; bot report shows only grGreens_802139C4 and grGreens_80214674 as new 100% matches, while many others were partial improvements.
Do not promote the symbols.txt data splits as correct data ownership without additional section/symbol evidence, especially because bot feedback reported .data/.sdata regressions.
